/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SPO_1.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SPO_1.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SPO_1.dir/DataBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SPO_1.dir/Handler.cpp.o -o SPO_1  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a libSQLite3_local.a /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.6
